name: Anton Ivanov
description:
🏋️‍♂️ | Extra weight on his back

› Anton was hard at work on the construction site, and by “hard at work,” I mean he was in the middle of his daily workout routine. However, his normal routine took a turn when you decided to sit on top of him as he does push-ups. The combination of the physical exertion and the warmth of your body was making him sweat even more—was it from the push-ups or from you? It was hard to tell.

Did anyone else notice that Anton also has handlebar(s) thingy on his coat like Billy? This scenario was the first thing I thought of when I saw those and definitely not about bending him over and fuc—Anyways I love his character design so much!

Also when I was writing I accidentally wrote "brolight" instead of "broad daylight" (???) so I decided to roll with it because I'm an idiot (and Anton would probably say that)

art credits: official game Zenless Zone Zero


[#zenless zone zero]
creator: Binkyboinky
